prompt:
Goal: Create a polished anime-style 2x2 seasonal illustration collage featuring the same Mio and Megumi-inspired young woman across all four seasons, with a romantic cinematic atmosphere and a small Japanese seasonal caption in each panel.

Canvas: Vertical 4:5 image, divided into exactly 4 equal panels by thin white borders: top-left spring, top-right summer, bottom-left autumn, bottom-right winter. Use high-detail Japanese anime rendering, soft glow, delicate rim light, shallow depth of field, and a dreamy seasonal color palette.

Character continuity: In all 4 panels show the same elegant teenage/young adult anime girl with long straight black hair, pale skin, slim build, gentle posture, and silver hairpins on one side. Her face is intentionally anonymized by a centered soft blurred square censor block in every panel, while the rest of the image remains sharp and detailed.

Panel 1, top-left spring: The girl stands on a canal-side path under full-bloom cherry trees, wearing a pale pink blouse and light lavender skirt, carrying a beige shoulder bag with a small bow detail. She holds one hand out as cherry petals fall around her. Background includes water reflections, railings, and sunlit sakura branches. Add a small white translucent caption ribbon at the lower-left with pink floral decoration and the exact text 春、桜の帰り道.

Panel 2, top-right summer: The girl stands on a seaside boardwalk at night under a starry sky and Milky Way, wearing a white frilled sleeveless top and flowing blue skirt with a dark belt. Her hair streams in the ocean breeze; one hand touches her hair. Background includes the moonlit sea, railing, warm street lamps, and distant coastal lights. Add a small dark blue translucent caption ribbon at the lower-right with the exact text 夏、星降る海辺.

Panel 3, bottom-left autumn: The girl sits at an outdoor café table during golden-hour autumn, wearing a beige knit sweater and dark plaid skirt. She rests one cheek on her hand while holding a takeaway coffee cup on the table. Background includes warm café lights, a chalkboard café sign, candles, wrought-iron furniture, and falling red maple leaves. Add a small warm brown translucent caption ribbon at the lower-left with maple leaf accents and the exact text 秋、夕暮れのカフェ.

Panel 4, bottom-right winter: The girl stands in a snowy station square at night, wearing a cream coat, dark blue plaid scarf, gloves, and a small black crossbody bag, holding a warm drink close to her chest. Background includes falling snow, wet reflective pavement, glowing street lamps, station architecture, and a clock tower. Add a small icy blue translucent caption ribbon at the lower-right with the exact text 冬、雪明かりの駅前.

Constraints: Use exactly 4 panels and exactly 4 caption ribbons, one per panel. Keep the same character design across all panels. Do not add extra characters, logos, watermarks, speech bubbles, or additional text beyond the four captions. Maintain high-resolution anime illustration quality with rich lighting and seasonal atmosphere.
